exemplar.title: To what extent can modelling of a function, integration and kinematics be used to estimate distance, displacement of the route from Warsaw, Poland to Berlin, Germany from the average velocity of the car of the whole trip?

detailedExemplarData.title: To what extent can modelling of a function, integration and kinematics be used to estimate distance, displacement of the route from Warsaw, Poland to Berlin, Germany from the average velocity of the car of the whole trip?

subject.title: Mathematics Analysis and Approaches (AA)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics Analysis and Approaches** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **number and algebra, functions, geometry and trigonometry, statistics and probability, and calculus**, with a strong focus on **theoretical understanding, formal mathematical reasoning, and analytical problem-solving**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Non-calculator written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 2** | Calculator allowed written exam | 90 minutes | 120 minutes | 40% |
| **Paper 3** | Calculator allowed problem-solving | N/A | 60 minutes | 20% (HL only) |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal Assessment | 20 hours | 20 hours | 20% |

strengths: Clear, logical flow following the table of contents and numbered subsections
Purposeful organization with a formal cover page, contents page, appendix and bibliography
Concise structure separating Introduction, Exploration, Evaluation and Conclusion
weaknesses: Minor breaks in flow (verbose narratives, irrelevant details) interrupt coherence
Inaccurate page references in the table of contents hinder navigation
Repeated formula tables and unnecessary digressions dilute conciseness
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments place Presentation at band 3: the work is coherent and well organized but falls short of âhighly coherent/exceptional organizationâ due to verbosity, minor navigational errors and occasional irrelevance. A score of 3/4 reflects this solid but improvable performance.

strengths: Use of standard mathematical notation (integrals, piecewise functions, error calculations)
Multiple representations via graphs, displacementâdistance sketches and tabular data
Generally understandable logical progression from definitions through calculations to conclusions
weaknesses: Frequent notation slips (missing modulus signs, inconsistent variable names) and mis-types
Low-resolution images, unlabeled axes and inconsistent formatting reduce clarity
Long blocks of algebra without summarizing commentary blur the logical thread
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands reside in band 2: there is some appropriate notation and representation, and the argument is moderately clear, but recurring errors and clarity issues prevent higher marks. Thus, 2/4 accurately reflects the moderate level of mathematical communication.

strengths: Embedding of personal context (family trips, driving licence) shows genuine motivation
Designing a custom 50-segment model demonstrates independent thinking
Proposals for future extensions (fuel-cost modelling) indicate creativity and initiative
weaknesses: Mathematical techniques remain fairly standard and lack novel innovation
The approach, while personal, does not break new ground in modelling methods
Evidence of creativity, though good, stops short of exceptional originality
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Strand assessments uniformly place Personal Engagement at band 2: significant independent thinking and personal approach appear, but the work does not reach the level of outstanding or highly innovative. A score of 2/3 aligns with these observations.

strengths: Meaningful reflections on the small percentage error and its sources
Thoughtful analysis of limitations and causes (piecewise linearity, detours)
Clear evaluation of outcomes with sensible improvement suggestions
weaknesses: Reflections remain largely descriptive without deep probing of assumptions
Lacks quantification of error margins and comparison with alternative models
Does not fully explore future implications or broader generalizations
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Each Reflection strand sits firmly in band 2: there is meaningful reflection and thoughtful analysis, but the depth, critical insight and comprehensive evaluation required for higher bands are lacking. Thus, 2/3 is appropriate.

strengths: Effective use of integral calculus and piecewise modelling directly addressing the research question
Appropriate application of course-level mathematics (kinematics definitions, error estimation)
Thorough understanding of distance vs displacement and mostly correct evaluations
weaknesses: Minor algebraic sign errors and occasional procedural repetition
Some irrelevant derivative rules included in formula tables
Notation inconsistencies and small calculation slips appear intermittently
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Use of Mathematics strands are consistently in band 4: the mathematics is relevant, fully commensurate with SL level, and mostly correct. While there are minor errors and some redundancy, the overall substance warrants 4/6, balancing quality and areas for improvement.

strandSelections.reasoning: Arguments are generally understandable: definitions lead into formulae, which lead into worked integrals, then into percentage error. Still, long blocks of algebra without summarising sentences and occasional copy-paste errors blur clarity, so the logical communication is only moderate.

The student demonstrates good understanding of displacement versus distance, and most integrals are evaluated correctly. Small algebraic slips and notation issues appear, but they rarely propagate to final answers, so accuracy is âmostly correctâ rather than flawless, fitting band 4.

Graphs, a displacement-distance sketch and extensive tabular data supplement the prose; however many images are low resolution, axes lack clear scales and the piecewiseâlinear model is only partially superimposed on raw data. These shortcomings keep the work in the âsome useâ category rather than âeffective useâ.

The exploration follows a clear sequence that mirrors the table of contents; the reader can trace the flow from rationale, through modelling, to evaluation without confusion. Section headings, numbered intervals and cumulativeâsum statements all contribute to a logical thread. Minor breaks in flow (e.g., digressions about Wordâs missing â|â symbol and repeated formula tables) prevent it from feeling âhighly coherentâ, but overall the structure remains easy to follow.

Modelling velocity with 50 linear pieces and computing a percentage-error check shows initiative, and the discussion of future fuel-cost extensions indicates some creativity. Still, the mathematical techniques themselves are conventional, so the work does not merit the âexceptional creativityâ level.

The analysis of results focuses on potential causes of the small error (piecewise linearity, detours to petrol stations) and briefly links them to kinematic theory, representing a âthoughtfulâ rather than âdeep and insightfulâ critique.

The student evaluates accuracy with a percentage-error formula and proposes concrete improvements (same-day data collection, higher-order curve fitting). While these are sensible, the work does not extend to comprehensive future implications or broader generalisation, positioning it in band 2.

Reflection is present throughout: the student revisits earlier limitations, interprets the 0.349 % error and comments on accuracy sources. These reflections are meaningful but remain largely descriptive; they stop short of probing alternative models or questioning underlying assumptions in depth, aligning with band 2.

Standard notation (â«, dx, absolute value) is used but with frequent slips â missing modulus signs, inconsistent variable names and mis-types such as âsplacementâ. The student attempts vectors, piecewise functions and % error correctly but occasionally misplaces brackets or units. This constitutes âsome appropriateâ use rather than consistent accuracy.

The student embeds personal context (friendsâ travel costs, new driving licence) and explains why each methodological choice was made, giving the assignment a clear personal stamp. The approach, however, is not especially novel or innovative, so the descriptor for band 2 is most fitting.

The narrative is often verbose: long autobiographical paragraphs, full reproductions of 50 interval calculations and repeated formulae dilute relevance. Nevertheless, the majority of content is mathematically pertinent, so the piece is âmostly relevantâ rather than dominated by irrelevance, fitting band 2.

Integral calculus, piecewise modelling, absolute value for distance and error estimation are all clearly relevant to the task and are carried through the exploration. The mathematics is substantial for SL and directly addresses the research question, constituting ârelevant mathematics used effectivelyâ.

Choosing a personal driving app, designing a 50-segment model and persevering through lengthy hand integration show genuine independent effort beyond textbook examples. Yet the mathematics remains fairly standard (straight-line approximation) and does not break new ground, placing it solidly in âsignificant evidenceâ but not âoutstandingâ.

A formal cover page, contents page, numbered sub-sections, appendix and bibliography show purposeful organisation. Each major part (Introduction, Exploration, Evaluation, Conclusion) is distinct and properly ordered. Some page references in the contents are inaccurate and the appendix is hard to navigate, so the work is short of the âexceptionally well organisedâ descriptor.

The calculus, kinematics definitions and numerical integrations sit squarely at SL level; there is no advanced HL content, but the quantity and sustained application meet the âfully commensurate with course levelâ descriptor. Minor procedural repetition keeps it from the top two bands.

annotations.comment: The discussion of app limitations acknowledges measurement bias but does not quantify the potential error margin. Adding a basic error estimate would strengthen this section.
The route limitation analysis thoughtfully considers detours, but could be supported by actual stop durations or distances to substantiate the impact.
The final limitation acknowledges timing discrepancies but ends abruptly without a summarizing statement. Conclude each limitation sub-section with a clear takeaway.
The formula table is comprehensive but includes derivative rules that are not applied later. Focus on integration rules to improve relevance.
The topic statement is verbose and could be more concise. Consider refining the research focus and removing unnecessary words to improve relevance and clarity.
The table of contents lists incorrect page numbers, reducing navigational accuracy. Verify and update all page references to reflect the actual document layout.
The research question is clearly stated but the phrasing is awkward. Simplify âfrom the average velocity of the car of the whole tripâ to improve precision and readability.
The rationale includes lengthy personal narrative that dilutes mathematical focus. Summarize and prioritize content directly related to methodology to enhance conciseness.
Embedding personal context through testing the app on a family trip effectively demonstrates engagement and motivation for this investigation.
Definitions of displacement and distance are accurate, but the explanation omits mention of potential negative velocity. Emphasize why absolute value is needed in the distance formula.
The distance formula is correctly presented but the accompanying text omits explicit discussion of the modulus notation, which is central to distinguishing distance from displacement.
Figure 3 effectively illustrates displacement versus distance but lacks axis labels and clear resolution, reducing the impact of this representation.
The explanation of absolute value in the velocity function is thorough, demonstrating a strong grasp of why distance and displacement differ in calculation.
The velocity vs speed discussion cites GeeksforGeeks (2023) but does not integrate formal referencing style. Use consistent in-text citations and bibliography entries.
The methodology description clearly outlines future modelling steps but lacks mention of expected accuracy or error bounds associated with the piecewise linear approximation.
The heading â3.1.1 Formulas usedâ sets context, but the narrative does not reference specific formulas afterwards. Link each formula explicitly to its application.
The velocity graph is plotted clearly, but axes lack numerical labels and units. Adding tick marks and axis titles would greatly enhance clarity.
Referencing âfig.6â in the text without a corresponding caption breaks continuity. Ensure each figure has a caption and is cited consistently.
The integration example steps are well laid out, but inconsistent LaTeX formatting of equations can be distracting. Standardize notation throughout.
Step 3 correctly applies the fundamental theorem but omits explicit mention of the constant of integration, which may confuse readers unfamiliar with the process.
The algebraic manipulation in the second interval integral contains a sign error when combining terms, which may propagate to the final result. Re-check the calculation.
The explanatory paragraph about missing the vertical bar symbol in Word is not relevant to the mathematics. Remove this detail to maintain conciseness.
Percentage error is calculated correctly, but the variables $v_A$ and $v_E$ are not clearly defined in this context. Restate definitions to avoid ambiguity.
The discussion of results is insightful, but incorporating a comparison to alternate mapping sources (e.g., Google Earth) would deepen critical analysis.
The percentage error discussion quantifies the result but does not reflect on its broader implications. Add commentary on how this accuracy level informs model validity.
